headline: Why C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of freight transportation intermediary C.H. Robinson (NASDAQ:CHRW) jumped 2.9% in the afternoon session after ship-tracking services reported the first vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.
